Heat / Sun Exposure Advisory
Heat injury remains a routine operational risk in the Philippines. Hydrate aggressively, use shade when available, limit prolonged midday sun exposure, and monitor for signs of heat exhaustion or heat stroke.
Use sunscreen, lightweight clothing, and electrolytes as needed. Overcast conditions do not eliminate heat risk.
notes: Five-day Manila/NAIA forecast with heat-exposure advisory.
